regions.text: Machines keep business accounts and photograph records. They work much faster than people when dealing with millions of facts.
(Diagram: A large accounting machine vs. many manual workers). Machines can do in a minute what a man does in a year.
However, the questions and ideas come from human minds. Men still control the machines. (Illustration: Men planning and calculating).
FUTURE: will photograph. PRESENT: photograph(s). PAST: photographed.
